claims.summary: The pressure/noise boundary should use a smooth knee rather than a discrete cliff.
claims.disposition: Verified smoothstep pressure and gradient room in the current dynamic-noise helper.

claims.summary: Viscous rho must stay bounded and continuous at its threshold.
claims.disposition: Verified the rho ceiling and threshold-edge no-jump test.

claims.summary: The exact 0.849/0.851 pair should be compared in a deterministic replay.
claims.disposition: Routed an explicit boundary replay without activating the helper in live control.

claims.summary: Hysteresis or additional smoothing may soften the boundary further.
claims.disposition: Preserved as Tier 5 because hysteresis and rho/noise retuning alter live ESN dynamics.
